name: RxSight, Inc.
summary: RxSight, Inc. is a commercial-stage medical technology company focused on customized vision correction following cataract surgery. Its proprietary RxSight system is the first and only commercially available premium cataract technology enabling post-surgical vision customization. The system comprises the Light Adjustable Lens (LAL/LAL+), the Light Delivery Device (LDD), and accessories. The LAL is a photosensitive silicone-based intraocular lens adjusted via UV light patterns from the LDD to optimize patient visual outcomes after implantation.

products.name: RxSight Light Adjustable Lens (LAL/LAL+)
products.description: A premium intraocular lens made from proprietary silicone-based photosensitive material that undergoes controlled refractive power changes when exposed to specific UV light patterns.

products.name: RxSight Light Delivery Device (LDD)
products.description: A device using proprietary software and algorithms to deliver UV light treatments that adjust the LAL's spherical and cylindrical refraction post-surgery.

products.name: RxSight System
products.description: An integrated premium cataract surgery system combining the LAL, LDD, and accessories to enable post-surgical vision customization and optimization.
